title: 9 European nations, Ukraine form an anti-ballistic missile coalition
summary_full: Nine European countries and Ukraine established a coalition for defensive anti-ballistic capabilities. This alliance aims to deter and defeat future missile threats effectively. The group will integrate defense industries, research, and operational experiences. Ukrainian President Zelensky attended a Paris meeting to reaffirm support for his nation. This initiative responds to growing ballistic missile threats and Ukraine's unique experiences.
